parameters: >  There was a Rag Bandage and a Milk Bottle in the chest.

>  There was a Geofruit in the chest.
>  There was a Milk Bottle and a Mush Arm in the chest.
>  A voice rings out in your mind...
It does not matter if I am cold at most times. It does not matter
That is no reason to consider any change in how I live.
>  There was a Shadow in the chest.
